column2: Local hostname/device running the resolver; if not present in lines, populate from collector/agent metadata.
DNS component emitting the log (e.g., dnsmasq); aligns resolver-specific behaviors.
Resolver process ID; helps correlate adjacent DNS events emitted by the same daemon instance.
DNS template class (query/forwarded/reply/cached/nameserver_error); drives semantic alignment.
Fully qualified domain name queried; primary DNS object for object-centric correlation.
DNS record type (A/AAAA/TXT/SRV); disambiguates parallel lookups for the same qname.
Client IP that issued the query to the resolver; aligns request origin with other network/auth sources.
Upstream DNS server/peer IP when present (forward target or resolver peer); aligns egress dependency paths.
Coarse answer category (ipv4/ipv6/cname/txt_like/none); normalizes heterogeneous reply bodies.
DNS resolution status (e.g., NOERROR/NXDOMAIN/REFUSED/NODATA); protocol-level outcome for DNS.
Where the response was served from (cache/upstream/local); separates cache hits from real upstream traffic.
Cross-log outcome abstraction derived from status_code (success/failure/unknown); supports unified filtering.
